title: leuzea nitida
intro: Leuzea nitida, also known as Krestin, is a plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include stimulating the immune system and improving overall health. The health benefits of Leuzea nitida include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and enhancing antioxidant defenses. Leuzea nitida can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being and vitality.
